headline: After a BIG Run, Can CSX Climb Another 15% to BofA’s $46 Price Target?
summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) has been one of the stronger performers in the railroad sector over the past year, with shares up more than 34% over the trailing twelve months. Year-to-date, the stock has gained 9.22%, though it has pulled back over the past week to a current price of $39.62, off its 52-week high of ... headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on CSX, Lowers Price Target to $46
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Ken Hoexter   maintains CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $48 to $46.
